title: Smithable Swords
description: A supplementary pack to my Trimmable Swords resource pack.
body:
# Swords can be trimmed now!

This datapack is meant as a supplementary to my [Trimmable Swords resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trimmableswords) that adds additional recipies to the smithing table allowing smithing templates to be applied to swords.
